# Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One paragraph or a short bullet list. -->

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/*` branch)
- [ ] New feature (`feature/*` branch)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/*` branch)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/*` branch)
- [ ] Release (`release/*` branch)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated; all pass (`task test`)
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 80% on changed code
- [ ] `task format && task lint` pass
- [ ] `task typecheck` passes
- [ ] No file exceeds 1000 lines
- [ ] Documentation updated alongside the code change
- [ ] Screenshots or CLI output included (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Migrations reviewed and documented (if applicable)
